_comment: GLOBAL CARD - Server-wide settings singleton. Must have GUID 49842157 (StaticCardGUID.java). Loaded by CardBuilder.java -> GlobalCard.java. Fields: TitaniumRepairCard/CubitsRepairCard (repair cost multipliers), CapitalShipPrice (merits to buy capital ship), UndockTimeout (seconds before auto-undock), friendBonusRewardGuid (reward card for friend referrals), specialFriendBonus (map of level->bonus).
